items: Public Hearing: Proposed Education Parcel Tax on June 2, 2026 Election
Adoption of Resolution No. 21: Calling an Election for Parcel Tax Renewal

items.intro_words: And so now we move on to number six, a public hearing regarding proposed educational parcel tax.
Well, noted the public hearing and now we're on to 7.1, which is the adoption of resolution number 21.
